name: Brick Court Chambers
message: Founded in 1921, Brick Court Chambers is one of barristers’ chambers in the UK. Specializes in Commercial, Competition, International/EU and Public Law.Brick Court Chambers corporate office is located in 7-8 Essex St, London, Greater London, WC2R 3LD, United Kingdom. The total amount of data leakage is 140.93 GB
